enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.help: Enable automatic TwinMind RAG context injection on every prompt

ragHost.label: RAG Host
ragHost.help: Primary RAG HTTP server URL (default: http://100.71.2.13:18790)

ragFallbackHost.label: RAG Fallback Host
ragFallbackHost.help: Fallback RAG HTTP server URL when primary is unavailable (default: http://127.0.0.1:18790)

maxChars.label: Max Context Characters
maxChars.help: Maximum characters of RAG context to inject into the system prompt (default: 4000)

maxChunks.label: Max Chunks
maxChunks.help: Maximum number of RAG document chunks to include (default: 8)

topK.label: Top K Results
topK.help: Number of top RAG results to retrieve per query (default: 5)

timeoutMs.label: RAG HTTP Timeout (ms)
timeoutMs.help: Timeout in milliseconds for each RAG HTTP request (default: 5000)
